English Language Requirements.Remarks: To accept the offer, student will have to pay the 1st installment fee along with visa fee, insurance fee etc. to proceed further for the visa application and this will be intimated by the institutions along with the offer letter.

Dubai.Remarks: IELTS not required if if student has scored 70% marks in English in 12th

English Language Requirements.IELTS Waiver Percentage (%): Minimum 70 in english in 12th std should be completed within 5 years

Payment and Visa Details.Deposit Requirement: Tuition Fee (1st trimester) and visa fees

Dubai.Remarks: IELTS waiver possible if student has scored 70% marks in English in 12th std for UG courses in last 5 years
IELTS not required, Freshers MBA available

English Language Requirements.IELTS Waiver Percentage (%): IELTS waiver possible if student has scored 70% marks in English in 12th std for UG courses.

Dubai.Remarks: IELTS waiver possible if student has scored 70% marks in English in 12th std in CBSE for UG courses.
2 LORS mandatory for each courses and  Freshers MBA available
For MBA, they need 0-3.5 years of work experience , above 3.5 years of experience will not be accepted for MBA courses in IMT dubai

Australia.Applicable Application Submission Fees:
1. Application fees: AUD 150

*Applicant can get the application fee waiver code but on open days only
Australia.Application Submission Mode:
1. Application is submitted from University's Application portal
Please use below link for university portal:

https://applyonline.unsw.edu.au/agent-login

2.Please use ZOHO Vault for UNSW login
Australia.Application Submission Process:
Apply on UNSW "Apply online portal"
1. Select from below available options. 
Undergraduate /Postgraduate/Postgraduate Research
2. Click on start new application.
3. Fill out the required fields in my personal detail section. Personal details must match with applicant's passport details. 
4. Select degree preference in my application selection. 
5. Select appropriate prior qualification details of the applicant in my qualification section. 
6. Provide other details of the applicant such as English proficiency, employment details or other qualifications in other details section. 
7. Documents required for the application assessment must be attached separately in the available tab. Any irrelevant documents attached in the table will be rejected and escalated. 
8. Finish application and save the application in the CF.

Apply online on SIMS which is UNSW online Portal with supporting documents under categorized checklist only and not in Bulk 
Attachments.
• DO NOT upload illegible , incomplete documents, missing marksheets. Such applications will NOT BE considered for assessment 
purpose and eventually will be delayed.
Australia.Required Additional Documents:
1. GTE Assessment and Financial Declaration Form

(Required at GTE stage only)

Each form must be signed/stamped and dated by the counsellor on declaration page

Incomplete forms will experience delays
Australia.Additional Remarks:
1. Once conditional offer letter is released it is valid for only 8 weeks (56 days)
2. If offer is expired or course needs to changed, it can't be reinstated, need submit new application with application fee
3. Once Unconditional offer letter is released it is valid for only 3 weeks (21 days)
4. Offer letter are to be released in rounds, and applications should be submitted 4 weeks prior to that.
Australia.Interview Status: No Interview
Australia.GTE Approval: GTE and Financial Declaration form along with Financial Documents is to shared with University

• Separate codes for Undergraduate and Postgraduate applications

Australia.Application Submission Process:
1.Please login to ZOHO Vault for Study Link portal login

2. Click on "Applicants" option on study link dashboard.

3. Click on "Create Applicant", and fill out all the information required in the applicants page. "Save" Information and applicants ID will get created in study link.

4. Click on "Applications" option in applicants ID.  Click on "Create Application" .

5. Add course name in "Keywords" search box.  Select the name of the university student opted the course mentioned in course finder. Click on "Search".

6. Once you have filtered the coursework shows in the search results, click on "Apply".

7. Fill out all the information required in the application form and submit with below documents.

a) All academic documents|English Test documents|Work proof documents (if any) are consolidated in binder in accordance to the completion.

b) All the documents attached in the binder must be stamped with counsellor's stamp of the current month in which application is submitted.

Australia.Application Submission Process:
1. James Cook University, Brisbane applications are submitted via E-mail on below mentioned official email ID.

JCUB Admissions <admissions@jcub.edu.au>

2. Application submission process is as below:

a) Applicants profile is shared mentioning below details:
 
   Full name of the applicants
   Date of Birth  of the applicants
   Preferred Program
   Preferred Intake
   Email ID of the applicant
   Mobile No of the applicant

Note: Subject line of the email is as below - 

New Application - Applicants full name | James Cook University, Brisbane for (Preferred Intake) Intake 
   
Documents required:
   a) Applicants submitted documents binder
   b) Student Declaration Form (Manually signed by student)
   c) GTE Assessment Form (Manually signed by student)
   d) Application Form  (Manually signed by student)
   e) Agent Declaration (Signed and Stamped by agent|assignee)

While submitting the application in study link portal please follow below mandatory steps:

1. Please make sure students profile is assessed as per course requirements and all academic documents|English Test documents|Work proof documents (if any) are consolidated in binder in accordance to the completion.

2. All the documents attached in the binder must be stamped with counsellor's stamp of the current month in which application is submitted.

3. Foms:

 a) Student Declaration Form (Manually signed by student)
 b) GTE Assessment Form (Manually signed by student)
 c) Application Form  (Manually signed by student)
d) Agent Declaration (Signed and Stamped by agent|assignee)

Note: Form must be signed with applicants name and signature and should be stamped updated of the current month in which application is submitted.
Australia.Interview Status: University conducts an interview of the applicants at application assessment stage.
Australia.Change of Agent possibility:
TBC

Note: We usually do not encourage COA unless the student is facing serious concerns with their primary agent. If they have any issues then they can feel free to reach out to me and I can assist - Vaibhav Kwatra

Australia.Applicable Application Submission Fees: Swinburne University of Technology does not charge application fees.
Australia.Application Submission Mode:
1. Application is submitted from Study Link portal

Please use ZOHO Vault for Study Link login:

1. Passphrase: KC-Australia@1
Australia.Application Submission Process:
1.Please login to ZOHO Vault for Study Link portal login

2. Click on "Applicants" option on study link dashboard.

3. Click on "Create Applicant", and fill out all the information required in the applicants page. "Save" Information and applicants ID will get created in study link.

4. Click on "Applications" option in applicants ID.  Click on "Create Application" .

5. Add course name in "Keywords" search box.  Select the name of the university student opted the course mentioned in course finder. Click on "Search".

6. Once you have filtered the coursework shows in the search results, click on "Apply".

7. Fill out all the information required in the application form and submit with below documents.

a) All academic documents|English Test documents|Work proof documents (if any) are consolidated in binder in accordance to the completion.

b) All the documents attached in the binder must be stamped with counsellor's stamp of the current month in which application is submitted.

Note: Use your email ids where you are asked to enter agent/counsellors email id.
Australia.Additional Remarks:
While submitting the application in study link portal please follow below mandatory steps:

1. Please make sure students profile is assessed as per course requirements and all academic documents|English Test documents|Work proof documents (if any) are consolidated in binder in accordance to the completion.

2. All the documents attached in the binder must be stamped with counsellor's stamp of the current month in which application is submitted.

Note:

1. In case of Backlogs, backlog certificate is reqired from University/college 
2. Grade conversion sheet from College/University is mandatory in case the percentage/total marks are not mentioned on the marksheet/transcripts

While submitting the application in study link portal please follow below mandatory steps:

1. Please make sure students profile is assessed as per course requirements and all academic documents|English Test documents|Work proof documents (if any) are consolidated in binder in accordance to the completion.

2. All the documents attached in the binder must be stamped with counsellor's stamp of the current month in which application is submitted.

3. IELTS Score requirements: 

a) University provides IELTS score requirement relaxation for below applicants - 

Applicants completing/completed Bachelor's degree from section 1 and 2 university opting to apply for Business programs, Information Technology and Engineering programs.

Note: Above relaxation is applicable in below cases - 

1. Students must have Bachelors degree in the duration of last 5 years from the date of applied intake

2. Students profile will be accepted if student has scored 6 (6), 6.5 (5.5), or 6 (5.5) in IELTS.

Australia.Additional Remarks:
1. GTE check requirements for applicants in India

- GTE check form, which will be sent together with LOF
- GTE statement (300 words) indicating study motivation, choice of education provider, course and career plan
- Financial documents: either evidence of $60,000AUD annual income of the sponsor or sufficient fund (saving account bank statement) covering 12 months studying +living expenses.

2. Acceptable Study Gap: Maximum 2-year study gap since high school completion is allowed. Study/employment evidence might be asked for supporting documents. The study gap can be considered on case-by-case basis.
